title: AWS SWE Intern 2025
summary: Worked on G-CIM, an internal AWS CloudFormation service used by resource providers to manage GitHub coverage issue operations.

sections.heading: What I worked on
items: implemented an event-driven Step Functions workflow using AWS Lambda
paginated coverage issue repositories while reliably tracking issue modifications
enhanced metrics dashboards for resolved coverage issues by resource
improved visibility into daily, weekly, and monthly CloudFormation service coverage progress
